case_title: RED DIPPER, INC. VS. BUILD GROUP, INC ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER ; STIPULATION AND ORDER STAYING ACTION AND COMPELLING REFEREE (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BUILD GROUP, INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT RED DIPPER, INC. $396,207.80 PRINCIPAL, $48,365.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $39,620.78 INTEREST, $3,750.33 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $487,943.91, PLAINTIFF RED DIPPER, INC. SHALL RECOVER NOTHING ON ITS COMPLAINT AGAINST BUILD GROUP, INC. AND FIDELITY & DEPOSIT COMPANY OF MARYLAND. SEE SCANNED DOC
